ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification required for the job */,
  "post_name" TEXT /* Name of the job posting */,
  "last_date" TEXT /* Last date to apply for the job */,
  "apply_link" TEXT /* Link to apply for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Detailed location information */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum experience required for the job */,
  "application_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for applying */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_seekers" (
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job seeker */,
  "seeker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the job seeker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the job seeker */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the job seeker's account */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the job seeker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the job seeker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the job seeker */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the job seeker */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the job seeker */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the job seeker */,
  "work_experience" TEXT /* Work experience of the job seeker */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the job seeker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker making the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was made */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, shortlisted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted with the application */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of references provided by the job seeker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortlists" (
  "shortlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shortlist entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application being shortlisted */,
  "shortlist_status" TEXT /* Status of the shortlist (e.g., selected, rejected) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shortlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortlists_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, company, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., application status update, job posting update) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
